name: Innovative Payment Solutions, Inc.
summary: Company Overview We are a provider of digital payment solutions and services to businesses and consumers. The Company is currently a fintech provider of digital payment solutions presently focused on, through its participation in joint ventures, to exploit underserved markets and provide sophisticated credit card processing services.
